use: Instagram Story highlight cover (icon only, no text) — final asset needs a transparent background, so generate on a solid, easily-keyable flat background and remove it afterward
how_to_use: Paste `prompt_text` directly into Gemini as the image prompt. `prompt_spec` is the same content broken into fields for reference/tweaking — Gemini reads it as plain text, not a parsed schema. After generation, remove the flat white background before using it in Instagram (see post_processing_note).

brand_constants.primary_accent: #A855F7 (flat matte purple, single solid fill, no gradient)
brand_constants.shadow_accent: #6D28D9 (darker flat purple, hard-edged offset shadow duplicate only, never blurred)
brand_constants.outline_color: #F5F0FF (near-white, single continuous outline around the whole icon shape)
required_style_terms: minimalist app-icon quality like Notion, Linear, or Vercel's icon set

prompt_text: A single flat vector icon, centered and cropped tightly, of a literal four-pronged dinner fork: four equal vertical rounded-rectangle tines joined by a horizontal rounded-rectangle neck bar, connecting to one vertical rounded-rectangle handle below, all merged into one silhouette. Fill color flat matte purple (#A855F7), no gradient, no internal shading. One single continuous near-white (#F5F0FF) outline traces the outer boundary of the whole merged shape only, with no visible seams at the internal joints between tines/neck/handle. A hard-edged, fully opaque, offset silhouette shadow duplicate of the same shape in dark purple (#6D28D9) sits behind it, offset down and to the right by a small fixed distance — crisp edge, no blur, no soft falloff. Background: a single, perfectly flat, solid pure white (#FFFFFF) fill with absolutely no texture, gradient, shadow, or pattern, so the background can be cleanly removed with a chroma/color-key tool afterward. No text, no watermark, no additional shapes, no glow, no vignette. The icon is scaled to occupy about 55-60% of the canvas height, centered.

background.purpose: chroma-key removable stand-in for a real transparent background, since most text-to-image models cannot output alpha channels directly

subject.object: literal 4-pronged dinner fork, same construction as the logo asset
subject.outline: single continuous #F5F0FF outline around the whole merged silhouette, no per-segment seams
subject.shadow: hard offset #6D28D9 silhouette duplicate, crisp edge, no blur, no transparency falloff

prompt_spec.scale: ~55-60% of canvas height, centered both axes
prompt_spec.post_processing_note: after generation, remove the flat white background (color-key / remove.bg / Photoshop magic wand on the solid white) and export as a transparent PNG before using as an Instagram highlight cover
prompt_spec.negative_prompt: no gradient background, no drop shadow on the background, no vignette, no texture, no watermark, no text, no extra icons, no glow
